title: UTILITY ASSISTANCE - 211info
text: COMMUNITY SHARING PROGRAM UTILITY ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides financial assistance for utility bills. Assistance depends on available funding. The waitlist for LIHEAP opens November 1 and is sometimes closed by the following day. All other emergency assistance programs are utility company-specific. Waitlists for funds are established when the funding becomes available. 1440 Birch Avenue Cottage Grove, OR 97424 Eligibility: Varies by program (LIHEAP, Oregon HEAT, OLGA, OEP, Helping Hands) Hours: Monday 1:30pm-6pm, Tuesday-Friday 11am-3:30pm Email (541) 942-6492 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 942-2176 Main phone Main phone (541) 942-6492 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for availability of funds FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Social Security card, photo ID, proof of income, proof of address LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Zip codes 97424 (Lane County only), 97426, 97434, and 97451 SITE HOURS: Monday 1:30pm-6pm and Tuesday-Friday 11am-3:30pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: West on Main Street to N Street, turn right 2 blocks to Birch Street. LTD stop at Main and N Streets (2-minute walk). Services: Electric Service Payment Assistance Gas Service Payment Assistance Heating Fuel Payment Assistance Water Service Payment Assistance Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - FOOD PANTRY HOUSING/SHELTER - HOMELESSNESS PREVENTION HOUSING/SHELTER - LANE COUNTY COORDINATED ENTRY ACCESS POINTS HOUSING/SHELTER - RENT ASSISTANCE MATERIAL GOODS - ASSISTANCE FOR PEOPLE WITHOUT HOUSING MATERIAL GOODS - BABY SERVICES MATERIAL GOODS - BASIC NEEDS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
